subcodes.first_line: They have driven Us forth from one city and caused Us to enter another, and at the height of tribulation doth the Pen proclaim [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخرجونا من مدینه و ادخلونا فی مدینه اخری و فی قطب البلا ینادی القلم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
